evaluations.prompt: Create a README.md for a simple Python CLI tool that converts JSON to CSV. The tool is called 'json2csv' and has install instructions.
evaluations.expected_output: README with title, description, install section, usage example
assertions: Contains markdown header (h1) with project name
Has usage examples with code blocks

evaluations.prompt: Create a README.md for an agent-powered deal discovery system using Cloudflare Workers. Include multi-agent architecture mention.
evaluations.expected_output: README with architecture diagram reference, agent coordination mention, deal discovery value prop
assertions: Has mermaid diagram or architecture section
